mapper.insert: insert into batch.workflow_run ( tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, related_job_instance_id, biz_date, run_status, current_node_code, trace_id ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{relatedJobInstanceId}, #{bizDate}, #{runStatus}, #{currentNodeCode}, #{traceId} )
mapper.update: update batch.workflow_run set run_status = #{runStatus}, current_node_code = #{currentNodeCode}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}

update batch.workflow_run set run_status = #{runStatus}, current_node_code = #{currentNodeCode}, started_at = coalesce(started_at, #{startedAt}), updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
